TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Alpha Condé = Alpha Condé (kngkawas 1938 idas 3 diyax 4-) kiya ka seyjicya Guinea, kndadax kngkawas 2010 idas 12 psdhuwan phiyu soto Guinea. MnAfrika Ryeynmong cusi uri (kngkawas 2017 idas 1 diyax 30 wada mangal). Hiya pa dmuwi 20 knkawas hantay brah soto Lansana Conté, kiya ka hantay tang Guineas Jnmin Ryeynmong cusi. Mniq kngkawas 2010 kcka soto knbeyhing seyngkyo cida, wada balay mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo cida mbiyax mangal soto Guineas; kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2015 ka wada mangal soto Dungan. Taxa kndusan niya Alpha Condé pa wada mangal qridin das, niqan taxa laqi niya snaw, wa mniq Amirika muyas ka saya. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = alpħa ʦond* = alpħa ʦond* (kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *-) kija ka səɟiʦja guinəa, kndadax kŋkawas **** idas ** psdħuwan pħiju soto guinəa. mna*ɾika ɾjənmoŋ ʦusi uɾi (kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada maŋal). ħija pa dmuwi ** knkawas ħantaj bɾaħ soto lansana ʦont*, kija ka ħantaj taŋ guinəas ɟnmin ɾjənmoŋ ʦusi. mniq kŋkawas **** kʦka soto knbəħiŋ səŋkjo ʦida, wada balaj mniq tumn* mətaq ħjo ʦida mbijax maŋal soto guinəas; kija mi mniq kŋkawas **** ka wada maŋal soto duŋan. taxa kndusan nija alpħa ʦond* pa wada maŋal qɾidin das, niqan taxa laqi nija snaw, wa mniq amiɾika mujas ka saja. == pnjaħan pnatas ==
S.FORM: = Alpha Condé = Alpha Condé (kngkawas 1938 idas 3 diyax 4-) kiya ka seyjicya Guinea, kndadax kngkawas 2010 idas 12 psdhuwan phiyu soto Guinea. MnAfrika Ryeynmong cusi uri (kngkawas 2017 idas 1 diyax 30 wada mangal). Hiya pa dmuwi 20 knkawas hantay brah soto Lansana Conté, kiya ka hantay tang Guineas Jnmin Ryeynmong cusi. Mniq kngkawas 2010 kcka soto knbeyhing seyngkyo cida, wada balay mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo cida mbiyax mangal soto Guineas; kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2015 ka wada mangal soto Dungan. Taxa kndusan niya Alpha Condé pa wada mangal qridin das, niqan taxa laqi niya snaw, wa mniq Amirika muyas ka saya. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = alpħa ʦond* = alpħa ʦond* (kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *-) kija ka səɟiʦja guinəa, kndadax kŋkawas **** idas ** psdħuwan pħiju soto guinəa. mna*ɾika ɾjənmoŋ ʦusi uɾi (kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada maŋal). ħija pa dmuwi ** knkawas ħantaj bɾaħ soto lansana ʦont*, kija ka ħantaj taŋ guinəas ɟnmin ɾjənmoŋ ʦusi. mniq kŋkawas **** kʦka soto knbəħiŋ səŋkjo ʦida, wada balaj mniq tumn* mətaq ħjo ʦida mbijax maŋal soto guinəas; kija mi mniq kŋkawas **** ka wada maŋal soto duŋan. taxa kndusan nija alpħa ʦond* pa wada maŋal qɾidin das, niqan taxa laqi nija snaw, wa mniq amiɾika mujas ka saja. == pnjaħan pnatas ==
